# Record attributes: `bio_att`

This step selected important attribute columns, other than those defining context. The data attributes selected from `bio_all` were: 

  - `data_name`
  - `pa` (presence/absence)
  - `ind` (indigenous status)
  - `obs` (observer)
  - `sens_survey` and `sens_taxa` (denoting sensitive records)
  - `survey`
  - `method`

Attribute columns were generated by gathering all values from the last non-distinct data frame, and concatenating all values per context.
